public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as discipline clerk.
manner: Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a discipline clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of discipline clerk in and around Shelkopolis Civic Harmony Hall Variant, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Shelkopolis Civic Harmony Hall Variant workable through the obligations of discipline clerk while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must make memory legible under conditions that reward forgetting, misfiling, or selective recall. Around Shelkopolis Civic Harmony Hall Variant, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of discipline clerk visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Sera Moonthread can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.
Sera Moonthread needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Shelkopolis Civic Harmony Hall Variant.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Sera Moonthread communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Shelkopolis Civic Harmony Hall Variant: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
